name: Lemon Chicken (Fung Lum's)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound chicken breast fillets, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chicken, egg, 2 drops sesame oil, 2 tablespoons cornstarch, 2 teaspoons salt, and pepper until the chicken pieces are coated and the ingredients are blended.
2. Deep-fry in peanut oil heated to 400°F (204°C) until browned. Drain on paper towels.
3. Cut into smaller pieces. Keep warm while preparing the lemon sauce.
4. In a wok or small saucepan, combine 1/2 cup water, vinegar, lemon juice, sugar, 2 drops lemon extract, remaining drop sesame oil, and salt. Bring to a boil.
5. Blend 1 tablespoon water with the remaining 1 tablespoon cornstarch until smooth. Stir into the lemon mixture. Heat, stirring, until smooth and clear.
6. Pour the sauce over the chicken.
